description_long: This is a black bucket hat with a soft, flexible structure and a downward-sloping brim that encircles the entire crown. The crown is rounded and slightly slouched, with subtle creases and folds visible in the fabric, giving it a casual, worn-in appearance. The brim is moderately wide and flat, providing shade and coverage all around. The material appears to be a lightweight, woven fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with a matte finish and some visible texture. There are no visible decorative elements, logos, or embellishments on the exterior. The hat is designed for comfort and sun protection, making it suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or city streets.
description: A black, soft bucket hat with a rounded crown and a wide, downward-sloping brim, made from matte woven fabric and lacking any visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded crown and the full, even brim encircling the hat, with subtle fabric creases.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the left side of the brim and the gentle slouch of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and the continuous, flat brim with minor surface irregularities.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizing the smooth, unadorned surface and the consistent width of the brim.
